data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding stackable vs exclusive rules.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'stackable vs exclusive rules'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of these rules. The linked use case mentions the need for these rules but lacks the necessary details to assert their implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of stackable vs exclusive rules.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
